title: Lab 33: Bootloader Kernel Argument
description: Modify the system bootloader so every installed kernel boots with the required persistent argument.

tasks.title: Configure the bootloader on clientvm so that every
tasks.prompt: Configure the bootloader on clientvm so that every installed kernel boots with the kernel argument audit_backlog_limit=8192.

tasks.title: The change must persist across reboots and must not
tasks.prompt: The change must persist across reboots and must not require manual GRUB editing during startup.

hints: Use a persistent bootloader tool rather than a one-time edit at the GRUB menu.
Verify the configured kernel arguments for all installed kernels.
